blog.heading: Blog & News
blog.subtitle: Insights, tips, and stories about time, timezones, and global coordination
blog.newsletterSubtitle: Get the latest articles about time zones, scheduling, and global coordination delivered to your inbox

cityPage.descriptionP1: {{city}} is located in {{country}} and operates on the {{timezone}} timezone. This page provides real-time, accurate time information for {{city}}, including current time, timezone details, sunrise and sunset times, and geographic coordinates.
cityPage.descriptionP2: Use this page to check the current time in {{city}} for scheduling meetings, coordinating with teams, or planning international activities. The time is automatically synchronized and updates every second.

timer.heading: Timer
timer.subtitle: Set and track time with precision

unixConverter.heading: Unix Converter
unixConverter.subtitle: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates

countryPage.citiesSubtitle: {{count}} cities • Time zones and current time

countryDetail.aboutDescP1: {{country}} has {{cityCount}} major cities across {{tzCount}} timezone(s). Use this page to find current times in cities across {{country}} and compare them with other timezones worldwide.
countryDetail.aboutDescP2: Perfect for scheduling meetings, calls, or events with people in {{country}}. Each city page provides real-time accuracy, sunrise/sunset times, and timezone information.

cityDetail.description: {{city}} is located in the {{timezone}} timezone. This page displays real-time information including the current time, timezone offset, daylight saving time status, and sunrise/sunset times. Use this information for scheduling meetings, coordinating with teams, or planning events across different timezones.

meetingInvite.title: Meeting Invite
meetingInvite.heading: Create Meeting Invite
meetingInvite.subtitle: Generate shareable meeting invites with automatic timezone localization
meetingInvite.shareDesc: Share this link with participants. Each person will see the meeting time in their local timezone.

dstTracker.title: DST Tracker
dstTracker.heading: Daylight Saving Time Tracker
dstTracker.subtitle: Never miss DST changes across the world
dstTracker.fact1: DST is the practice of setting clocks forward by one hour during warmer months
dstTracker.fact2: Not all countries observe DST; some regions use it partially
dstTracker.fact3: DST typically begins in spring (March/April) and ends in fall (September/October)
dstTracker.fact4: Always verify DST dates for your specific timezone, as they can vary by region

teamDashboard.title: Team Dashboard
teamDashboard.heading: Team Timezone Management
teamDashboard.subtitle: Manage your team's timezones and find the best meeting times

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.desc: Sorry, the page you are looking for doesn't exist.
notFound.descLine2: It may have been moved or deleted.

inviteDetail.notFoundDesc: This invite link may have expired or is invalid.

widget.title: Embed Widget
widget.heading: Embeddable Clock Widget
widget.subtitle: Add a real-time clock to your website with just a few lines of code
widget.method1Desc: Embed the widget using an iframe tag. Recommended for most websites.
widget.method2Desc: Embed the widget using a script tag. Automatically initializes all widgets on the page.
